title: The Echo in the Attic
idea: A young woman inherits her estranged grandmother's old house. While cleaning the dusty attic, she finds an old music box. When she winds it up, a faint, distorted lullaby plays. Later that night, she hears the same lullaby coming from the attic, but no one else is home. The next day, she finds a child's drawing of a shadowy figure with the same music box. The music box starts playing on its own intermittently, and the shadow figure in the drawings becomes more defined, looking eerily like her grandmother. The final scene shows her holding the music box as it plays, and a shadowy hand reaches out from behind her in the reflection of a nearby mirror, mimicking her movements.
targetAudience: Fans of supernatural horror, urban legends, and suspenseful short films.
